headline: Starbucks For Here Push And Digital Ordering Shift Reframe Investor Focus
summary: Starbucks is accelerating the transformation of its in store and licensed locations toward more for here coffeehouse formats. The company is rolling out over 1,000 new for here coffeehouses in a single year. Starbucks is also expanding digital ordering at high traffic venues such as airports and campuses. For investors tracking Starbucks, ticker NasdaqGS:SBUX, this shift comes with the stock recently trading at about $92.7. The shares show a 10.4% return year to date, while the 1 year, 3...

headline: Starbucks tests additional ordering methods in high-traffic locations
summary: Senior vice president Aaron Koransky said the company is exploring technology to provide more ways to access the brand in licensed stores

headline: 8 Things About Getting Rich You Aren’t Aware Of, According to Chelsea Fagan

headline: Starbucks: Full Price For A Half-Brewed Turnaround
summary: Starbucks trades at a forward P/E of 40.2x with a 9.35% EBIT margin, while top-line recovery has not translated into earnings. See why I rate SBUX stock a Sell.

headline: Starbucks AGM: “Back to Starbucks” turnaround, $500M staffing push, China plans, union Q&A
summary: Starbucks (NASDAQ:SBUX) used its 2026 annual meeting of shareholders to highlight progress under its “Back to Starbucks” initiative, outline priorities for store operations and international growth, and address a slate of governance and social-policy shareholder proposals. headline: 31-year-old Subway rival franchisee files Chapter 11 bankruptcy
summary: The debate continues on which fast-food sector is the most popular with Americans. At first guess, most people might say burgers because of the popularity of McDonald's, Wendy's, and Burger King.
